curation_notes: Patch commit f91125b26a6ca identified from the advisory references. Only 1 non-test source file changed (batik-dom/src/main/java/org/apache/batik/dom/AbstractDocument.java). The fix adds a type check (DOMImplementation.class.isAssignableFrom(c)) before calling newInstance() in the readObject deserialization method. Location derived from the patch diff: the vulnerable code is in the readObject method which reads a class name from the serialization stream and instantiates it without type validation. Checked sibling files (GenericDocument, AbstractStylableDocument, ExtensibleDOMImplementation) — none contain the same readObject deserialization pattern. Vulnerability class insecure-deserialization confirmed from CWE-502 and the advisory title 'Deserialization of Untrusted Data'.
